diagram_title: Manage Session 儲存 (0 上下文)
description: Top-level functional decomposition 的 Session-儲存 subsystem after migration 到 SQLite. Each level-1 activity maps 到 C4 component (see c4.js在 moduleRef / ideF0Ref). 2 decomposes 進入 21..23 在 embedded sub-level descriptor.

activities.title: 路由 儲存 呼叫
activities.description: 依-呼叫 dispatcher that detects whether <sid>.db 或 <sid>/ 是 來源 的 truth 與 forwards 到 SQLite 或 legacy implementation. Implements DD-9 signature compatibility.

activities.title: Operate Sqlite Store
activities.description: SQLite-backed Session 儲存. Owns connection pool, applies WAL pragmas (DD-3), runs integrity checks 與 schema migrations.

activities.title: Read Legacy Directory
activities.description: Read-僅 access 到 existing 依-訊息 / 依-part directory layout. Active during dual-track period 直到 Session 是 migrated.

activities.title: Migrate Legacy Session
activities.description: 閒置-time worker that performs three-stage atomic migration 的 單次 legacy Session 依 tick (DD-7 / DR-4). Inhabits same daemon process (DD-14).

activities.title: Inspect Session 狀態
activities.description: Debug CLI surface (DD-12) providing 清單 / show / check subcommands. Read-僅, dual-format-aware.

arrows.label: 儲存 呼叫 (Session.messages / 更新訊息 / 更新part)
Reader Query 來自 TUI 或 管理 面板
Messages 使用 Parts 結果
Messages 使用 Parts 結果
儲存 Corrupted Bus 事件
儲存 Migrated Bus 事件
Read 僅 儲存 呼叫

activities.title: Verify Database Integrity
activities.description: Runs PRAGMA integritycheck 在 first open 依 connection (DR-3). Caches 結果 供 lifetime 的 connection. Publishes Session.儲存.corrupted Bus 事件 在 failure 與 refuses 到 load.

activities.title: Manage Connection Pool
activities.description: Bounded LRU pool 的 SQLite handles keyed 由 SessionID (DD-10). Closes 閒置 connections after CONNECTION IDLE MS 到 prevent handle leak.

activities.title: 執行 schema Migration
activities.description: Compares meta.schemaversion vs runtime expected. Runs forward migration SQL inside transaction (DR-5); ROLLBACK 在 failure leaves DB 於 prior version, opens read-僅.

arrows.label: Acquire 請求 由 Session Id

validation_notes: Plan-builder convention is single idef0.json; MIAT skill normative spec asks for separate per-level files (a0, a1, a2). Compromise: A0 context here, A2 sub-level embedded under subDiagrams.A2 to preserve traceability without splintering files.
A1 (Router) does not decompose meaningfully — it is a single dispatch function.
A2.1 / A2.2 / A2.3 from c4.json are renamed A21 / A22 / A23 to comply with MIAT IDEF0 numbering convention (digits only).
Every activity has at least one input and one output arrow per IDEF0 normative profile §5.
AGENTS.md rule 1 (no silent fallback) modeled as an explicit Control arrow on A2.
